name: Code Reviewer
description: Reads pull requests, analyzes code quality, identifies bugs and anti-patterns, and leaves detailed review comments on GitHub.
defaultPrompt: Review the specified pull request. Analyze code for bugs, performance issues, security concerns, and style violations. Leave inline comments and a summary review.

name: Content Auditor
description: Checks Contentful entries for quality, completeness, SEO fields, broken references, and content standards compliance.
defaultPrompt: Audit the specified Contentful space. Check all entries for missing required fields, broken asset references, empty body content, and SEO metadata completeness. Produce a detailed report.

name: Research Agent
description: Performs deep web research on a given topic, synthesizes findings from multiple sources, and produces a comprehensive report with citations.
defaultPrompt: Research the specified topic thoroughly. Use web search to gather information from at least 10 sources. Synthesize findings into a structured report with executive summary, key findings, data points, and source citations.
